nodes.label: .`winner Bid carries creative size and category`()
.`falls back to user buyeruid then anonymous when user id is null`()
.`includes only creatives whose size matches the imp banner`()
.`passes through when no caps hit and no recent categories`()
.`drops candidates at or above their freq cap`()
.`drops candidates whose category was recently served`()
.`empty candidate list short-circuits without calling the client`()
.`drops candidates whose category is in bcat`()
.`drops candidates whose advertiser domain is in badv`()
.`returns empty when all candidates are blocked`()
.`returns empty when no candidate meets the floor`()
.`breaks ties with the injected Random deterministically`()
.`returns the only candidate without invoking randomness`()
.`POST openrtb bid returns a winning Bid for a 300x250 request`()
.`POST openrtb bid honors bcat blocking — empty result when all categories blocked`()
.`POST openrtb bid returns 400 when imp list is empty`()
.`each campaign has at least one creative and an advertiser domain`()
